error.invalid_scan_interval: Scan interval must be between 10 and 3600 seconds.
error.invalid_energy_delta_kwh: Energy delta must be 0 or greater (kWh).
error.invalid_power_unavailable_threshold: Power unavailable threshold must be 0 or greater.
error.invalid_local_auth: Invalid username or password for the local SOLARWATT Manager.
error.invalid_hems_auth: Invalid username or password for KiwiGrid HEMS (SOLARWATT Manager Portal).
error.not_solarwatt: Host does not appear to be a SOLARWATT Manager.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the SOLARWATT Manager.
error.missing_connection: Configure a local manager, KiwiGrid HEMS, or both.

data.scan_interval: Update interval: local devices and KiwiGrid Flow (seconds)
data.energy_delta_kwh: Energy change threshold (kWh). Write only if >= value; 0 = write every update
data.power_unavailable_threshold: Power unavailable threshold (polls). Keep the last value until the Nth unavailable; 0 = disable
data.disable_duplicate_item_entities: Disable duplicate item entities and prefer the UID-based channel item
data.kiwigrid_hems_username: KiwiGrid (SOLARWATT Manager Portal) username or email address
data.kiwigrid_hems_scan_interval: KiwiGrid HEMS interval: KiwiGrid devices and Stats (seconds)

devices.title: Select devices
devices.description: Select the devices to create using checkboxes. KiwiGrid and Battery are enabled by default.

abort.rebuild_entity_ids_done: Entity IDs were rebuilt using the pattern device name + sensor name.

error.invalid_energy_delta_kwh: Energy delta must be 0 or greater (kWh).
error.invalid_power_unavailable_threshold: Power unavailable threshold must be 0 or greater.

data.rebuild_entity_ids: Rebuild entity IDs when saving (device name + sensor name)
data.scan_interval: Update interval: local devices and KiwiGrid Flow (seconds)
data.energy_delta_kwh: Energy change threshold (kWh). Write only if >= value; 0 = write every update
data.power_unavailable_threshold: Power unavailable threshold (polls). Keep the last value until the Nth unavailable; 0 = disable
data.disable_duplicate_item_entities: Disable duplicate item entities and prefer the UID-based channel item
data.kiwigrid_hems_username: KiwiGrid (SOLARWATT Manager Portal) username or email address
data.kiwigrid_hems_scan_interval: KiwiGrid HEMS interval: KiwiGrid devices and Stats (seconds)

calculate_all_stats_values.name: Calculate all stats total values
calculate_all_stats_values.description: Calculate offsets for all SOLARWATT stats total sensors from completed previous KiwiGrid year values.

max_years.name: Maximum previous years
max_years.description: Maximum number of completed previous years to read. The current year is not included.

calculate_stats_value.name: Calculate stats total value
calculate_stats_value.description: Calculate the offset for selected SOLARWATT stats total sensors from completed previous KiwiGrid year values.

max_years.name: Maximum previous years
max_years.description: Maximum number of completed previous years to read. The current year is not included.

set_stats_value.name: Set stats total value
set_stats_value.description: Set either the desired Total sensor value or the direct offset.

value.name: Desired Total value
value.description: Desired Total sensor value in the sensor's native unit. The stored offset is calculated from this value.

offset.name: Offset
offset.description: Direct offset added to the calculated Total sensor value.

reset_stats_value.name: Reset stats total value
reset_stats_value.description: Remove the stored offset from a SOLARWATT stats total sensor.
